reviewer_title: jules: record cartographer learning on MCP server documentation drift 🗺️
summary: Attempted to align MCP Server Mode docs with the reality of the `tokmd tools` command. However, the PR was superseded by #1588 because `tokmd serve` is still intended as future work. Converted to a learning PR to capture the friction around documentation drift.
proof_summary: The attempt to recast MCP Server as `tokmd tools` was rejected because the server is still future work. A friction item was created to track this documentation clarity issue.
